v.CNV: 约雅敬在位的时候，巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒来攻打他，约雅敬就臣服他三年，后来却反悔，背叛他。
v.ESV: In his days, Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon came up, and Jehoiakim became his servant for three years. Then he turned and rebelled against him.
v.GAE: 여호야김 시대에 바벨론의 왕 느부갓네살이 올라오매 여호야김이 삼 년간 섬기다가 돌아서 그를 배반하였더니
v.KJV: In his days Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon came up, and Jehoiakim became his servant three years: then he turned and rebelled against him.
v.NASB: In his days Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon came up, and Jehoiakim became his servant for three years; then he turned and rebelled against him.
v.NIV: During Jehoiakim’s reign, Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon invaded the land, and Jehoiakim became his vassal for three years. But then he turned against Nebuchadnezzar and rebelled.
v.NRSV: In his days King Nebuchadnezzar of Babylon came up; Jehoiakim became his servant for three years; then he turned and rebelled against him.
v.SAENEW: 여호야김이 다스리던 해에, 바빌로니아의 느부갓네살 왕이 쳐들어왔다. 여호야김은 그의 신하가 되어 세 해 동안 그를 섬겼으나, 세 해가 지나자, 돌아서서 느부갓네살에게 반역하였다.
v.WLB: 여호야김이 다스리는 동안에 바벨론 왕 느부갓네살이 침입해 왔습니다. 그래서 여호야김은 3년 동안 느부갓네살의 속국 왕이 됐습니다. 그러다가 여호야김은 마음이 바뀌어 느부갓네살에게 반역했습니다.

v.CNV: 耶和华差派迦勒底的军队、亚兰的军队、摩押的军队和亚扪人的军队攻打他，他差他们攻击犹大，毁灭它，就像耶和华借着他的仆人众先知预言的话。
v.ESV: And the Lord sent against him bands of the Chaldeans and bands of the Syrians and bands of the Moabites and bands of the Ammonites, and sent them against Judah to destroy it, according to the word of the Lord that he spoke by his servants the prophets.
v.GAE: 여호와께서 그의 종 선지자들을 통하여 하신 말씀과 같이 갈대아의 부대와 아람의 부대와 모압의 부대와 암몬 자손의 부대를 여호야김에게로 보내 유다를 쳐 멸하려 하시니
v.KJV: And the LORD sent against him bands of the Chaldees, and bands of the Syrians, and bands of the Moabites, and bands of the children of Ammon, and sent them against Judah to destroy it, according to the word of the LORD, which he spake by his servants the prophets.
v.NASB: The LORD sent against him bands of Chaldeans, bands of Arameans, bands of Moabites, and bands of Ammonites. So He sent them against Judah to destroy it, according to the word of the LORD which He had spoken through His servants the prophets.
v.NIV: The Lord sent Babylonian, Aramean, Moabite and Ammonite raiders against him to destroy Judah, in accordance with the word of the Lord proclaimed by his servants the prophets.
v.NRSV: The LORD sent against him bands of the Chaldeans, bands of the Arameans, bands of the Moabites, and bands of the Ammonites; he sent them against Judah to destroy it, according to the word of the LORD that he spoke by his servants the prophets.
v.SAENEW: 주님께서는 바빌로니아 군대와 시리아 군대와 모압 군대와 암몬 자손의 군대를 보내셔서, 여호야김과 싸우게 하셨다. 이와 같이 주님께서 그들을 보내신 것은, 자기의 종 예언자들을 시켜서 하신 말씀대로, 유다를 쳐서 멸망시키려는 것이었다.
v.WLB: 여호와께서는 갈대아 사람들과 아람 사람들과 모압 사람들과 암몬 사람들을 보내 유다를 습격하게 하셨습니다. 이것은 여호와께서 그분의 종인 예언자들을 통해 하신 말씀에 따라 유다를 멸망시키려고 그들을 보내신 것이었습니다.

v.CNV: 这事临到犹大完全是出于耶和华的命令，因着玛拿西的罪，就是他所行的一切，要把他们从自己面前赶走；
v.ESV: Surely this came upon Judah at the command of the Lord , to remove them out of his sight, for the sins of Manasseh, according to all that he had done,
v.GAE: 이 일이 유다에 임함은 곧 여호와의 말씀대로 그들을 자기 앞에서 물리치고자 하심이니 이는 므낫세의 지은 모든 죄 때문이며
v.KJV: Surely at the commandment of the LORD came this upon Judah, to remove them out of his sight, for the sins of Manasseh, according to all that he did;
v.NASB: Surely at the command of the LORD it came upon Judah, to remove them from His sight because of the sins of Manasseh, according to all that he had done,
v.NIV: Surely these things happened to Judah according to the Lord ’s command, in order to remove them from his presence because of the sins of Manasseh and all he had done,
v.NRSV: Surely this came upon Judah at the command of the LORD, to remove them out of his sight, for the sins of Manasseh, for all that he had committed,
v.SAENEW: 이것은, 므낫세가 지은 그 죄 때문에 그들을 주님 앞에서 내쫓으시겠다고 하신 주님의 말씀이, 유다에게서 성취된 일이었다.
v.WLB: 이런 일이 유다에 일어난 것은 분명히 여호와의 명령에 따른 것으로 므낫세가 저지른 모든 죄와

v.CNV: 又因着他所流无辜人的血，他使耶路撒冷满了无辜人的血，耶和华决不赦免。
v.ESV: and also for the innocent blood that he had shed. For he filled Jerusalem with innocent blood, and the Lord would not pardon.
v.GAE: 또 그가 무죄한 자의 피를 흘려 그의 피가 예루살렘에 가득하게 하였음이라 여호와께서 사하시기를 즐겨하지 아니하시니라
v.KJV: And also for the innocent blood that he shed: for he filled Jerusalem with innocent blood; which the LORD would not pardon.
v.NASB: and also for the innocent blood which he shed, for he filled Jerusalem with innocent blood; and the LORD would not forgive.
v.NIV: including the shedding of innocent blood. For he had filled Jerusalem with innocent blood, and the Lord was not willing to forgive.
v.NRSV: and also for the innocent blood that he had shed; for he filled Jerusalem with innocent blood, and the LORD was not willing to pardon.
v.SAENEW: 더욱이 죄 없는 사람을 죽여 예루살렘을 죄 없는 사람의 피로 가득 채운 그의 죄를, 주님께서는 결코 용서하실 수 없으셨기 때문이다.
v.WLB: 또 그가 죄 없는 피를 흘렸기 때문이었습니다. 유다 백성들을 여호와의 눈앞에서 없애시려는 것이었습니다. 그가 예루살렘을 죄 없는 피로 가득 메웠기에 여호와께서 그것을 용서할 마음이 없으셨습니다.

v.CNV: 约雅敬其余的事迹和他所行的一切，不是都记在犹大列王的年代志上吗？
v.ESV: Now the rest of the deeds of Jehoiakim and all that he did, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Judah?
v.GAE: 여호야김의 남은 사적과 행한 모든 일은 유다 왕 역대지략에 기록되지 아니하였느냐
v.KJV: Now the rest of the acts of Jehoiakim, and all that he did, are they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?
v.NASB: Now the rest of the acts of Jehoiakim and all that he did, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Judah?
v.NIV: As for the other events of Jehoiakim’s reign, and all he did, are they not written in the book of the annals of the kings of Judah?
v.NRSV: Now the rest of the deeds of Jehoiakim, and all that he did, are they not written in the Book of the Annals of the Kings of Judah?
v.SAENEW: 여호야김의 나머지 행적과 그가 한 모든 일은 '유다 왕 역대지략'에 기록되어 있다.
v.WLB: 여호야김의 다른 일들과 그가 했던 모든 일들은 유다 왕들의 역대기에 기록돼 있습니다.

v.CNV: 约雅敬和他的祖先一同长眠，他的儿子约雅斤接续他作王。
v.ESV: So Jehoiakim slept with his fathers, and Jehoiachin his son reigned in his place.
v.GAE: 여호야김이 그의 조상들과 함께 자매 그의 아들 여호야긴이 대신하여 왕이 되니라
v.KJV: So Jehoiakim slept with his fathers: and Jehoiachin his son reigned in his stead.
v.NASB: So Jehoiakim slept with his fathers, and Jehoiachin his son became king in his place.
v.NIV: Jehoiakim rested with his ancestors. And Jehoiachin his son succeeded him as king.
v.NRSV: So Jehoiakim slept with his ancestors; then his son Jehoiachin succeeded him.
v.SAENEW: 여호야김이 그의 조상과 함께 누워 잠드니, 그의 아들 여호야긴이 그의 뒤를 이어 왕이 되었다.
v.WLB: 여호야김은 자기 조상들과 함께 잠들었고 여호야김의 아들 여호야긴이 뒤를 이어 왕이 됐습니다.

v.CNV: 埃及王不再从本国出征，因为巴比伦王占据了所有从前属于埃及王的领土，从埃及小河直到幼发拉底河。
v.ESV: And the king of Egypt did not come again out of his land, for the king of Babylon had taken all that belonged to the king of Egypt from the Brook of Egypt to the river Euphrates.
v.GAE: 애굽 왕이 다시는 그 나라에서 나오지 못하였으니 이는 바벨론 왕이 애굽 강에서부터 유브라데 강까지 애굽 왕에게 속한 땅을 다 점령하였음이더라
v.KJV: And the king of Egypt came not again any more out of his land: for the king of Babylon had taken from the river of Egypt unto the river Euphrates all that pertained to the king of Egypt.
v.NASB: The king of Egypt did not come out of his land again, for the king of Babylon had taken all that belonged to the king of Egypt from the brook of Egypt to the river Euphrates.
v.NIV: The king of Egypt did not march out from his own country again, because the king of Babylon had taken all his territory, from the Wadi of Egypt to the Euphrates River.
v.NRSV: The king of Egypt did not come again out of his land, for the king of Babylon had taken over all that belonged to the king of Egypt from the Wadi of Egypt to the River Euphrates.
v.SAENEW: 바빌로니아 왕이 이집트의 강에서부터 유프라테스 강까지, 이집트 왕에게 속한 땅을 모두 점령하였으므로, 이집트 왕은 다시는 더 국경 밖으로 나오지 못하였다.
v.WLB: 이집트 왕이 다시는 자기 나라에서 나오지 않았습니다. 바벨론 왕이 이집트의 시내로부터 유프라테스 강까지 이집트 왕의 모든 영토를 차지했기 때문입니다.

v.CNV: 约雅斤登基的时候是十八岁，他在耶路撒冷作王三个月；他母亲名叫尼护施他，是耶路撒冷人以利拿单的女儿。
v.ESV: Jehoiachin was eighteen years old when he became king, and he reigned three months in Jerusalem. His mother's name was Nehushta the daughter of Elnathan of Jerusalem.
v.GAE: 여호야긴이 왕이 될 때에 나이가 십팔 세라 예루살렘에서 석 달간 다스리니라 그의 어머니의 이름은 느후스다요 예루살렘 엘라단의 딸이더라
v.KJV: Jehoiachin was eighteen years old when he began to reign, and he reigned in Jerusalem three months. And his mother’s name was Nehushta, the daughter of Elnathan of Jerusalem.
v.NASB: Jehoiachin was eighteen years old when he became king, and he reigned three months in Jerusalem; and his mother's name was Nehushta the daughter of Elnathan of Jerusalem.
v.NIV: Jehoiachin was eighteen years old when he became king, and he reigned in Jerusalem three months. His mother’s name was Nehushta daughter of Elnathan; she was from Jerusalem.
v.NRSV: Jehoiachin was eighteen years old when he began to reign; he reigned three months in Jerusalem. His mother’s name was Nehushta daughter of Elnathan of Jerusalem.
v.SAENEW: 여호야긴은 왕이 되었을 때에 열여덟 살이었다. 그는 예루살렘에서 석 달 동안 다스렸다. 그의 어머니 느후스다는 예루살렘 출신인 엘라단의 딸이다.
v.WLB: 여호야긴은 18세에 왕이 돼 예루살렘에서 3개월 동안 다스렸습니다. 그의 어머니의 이름은 느후스다로 예루살렘 엘라단의 딸입니다.

v.CNV: 他行耶和华看为恶的事，好像他的祖先一切所行的。
v.ESV: And he did what was evil in the sight of the Lord , according to all that his father had done.
v.GAE: 여호야긴이 그의 아버지의 모든 행위를 따라서 여호와께서 보시기에 악을 행하였더라
v.KJV: And he did that which was evil in the sight of the LORD, according to all that his father had done.
v.NASB: He did evil in the sight of the LORD, according to all that his father had done.
v.NIV: He did evil in the eyes of the Lord , just as his father had done.
v.NRSV: He did what was evil in the sight of the LORD, just as his father had done.
v.SAENEW: 여호야긴은 조상이 하였던 것처럼, 주님께서 보시기에 악한 일을 하였다.
v.WLB: 여호야긴은 자기 조상들이 그랬던 것처럼 여호와 보시기에 악을 저질렀습니다.

v.CNV: 那时，巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒的臣仆来到耶路撒冷，城就被围困。
v.ESV: At that time the servants of Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon came up to Jerusalem, and the city was besieged.
v.GAE: 그 때에 바벨론의 왕 느부갓네살의 신복들이 예루살렘에 올라와서 그 성을 에워싸니라
v.KJV: At that time the servants of Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon came up against Jerusalem, and the city was besieged.
v.NASB: At that time the servants of Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon went up to Jerusalem, and the city came under siege.
v.NIV: At that time the officers of Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon advanced on Jerusalem and laid siege to it,
v.NRSV: At that time the servants of King Nebuchadnezzar of Babylon came up to Jerusalem, and the city was besieged.
v.SAENEW: 그 때에 바빌로니아의 느부갓네살 왕의 군대가 예루살렘을 치러 올라와서, 이 도성을 포위하였다.
v.WLB: 그때 바벨론 왕 느부갓네살의 군대가 예루살렘으로 진격해 성을 포위했습니다.

v.CNV: 尼布甲尼撒的臣仆正在围城的时候，巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒亲自来到耶路撒冷。
v.ESV: And Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon came to the city while his servants were besieging it,
v.GAE: 그의 신복들이 에워쌀 때에 바벨론의 왕 느부갓네살도 그 성에 이르니
v.KJV: And Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon came against the city, and his servants did besiege it.
v.NASB: And Nebuchadnezzar the king of Babylon came to the city, while his servants were besieging it.
v.NIV: and Nebuchadnezzar himself came up to the city while his officers were besieging it.
v.NRSV: King Nebuchadnezzar of Babylon came to the city, while his servants were besieging it;
v.SAENEW: 이렇게 그의 군대가 포위하고 있는 동안에, 바빌로니아의 느부갓네살 왕이 이 도성에 도착하였다.
v.WLB: 그리고 바벨론 왕 느부갓네살도 자기 군대가 포위하는 동안 직접 예루살렘 성까지 올라왔습니다.

v.CNV: 犹大王约雅斤和他的母亲、众臣仆、众领袖，以及众太监，出城投降巴比伦王。巴比伦王于是捉住他。那时，是巴比伦王在位第八年。
v.ESV: and Jehoiachin the king of Judah gave himself up to the king of Babylon, himself and his mother and his servants and his officials and his palace officials. The king of Babylon took him prisoner in the eighth year of his reign
v.GAE: 유다의 왕 여호야긴이 그의 어머니와 신복과 지도자들과 내시들과 함께 바벨론 왕에게 나아가매 왕이 잡으니 때는 바벨론의 왕 여덟째 해이라
v.KJV: And Jehoiachin the king of Judah went out to the king of Babylon, he, and his mother, and his servants, and his princes, and his officers: and the king of Babylon took him in the eighth year of his reign.
v.NASB: Jehoiachin the king of Judah went out to the king of Babylon, he and his mother and his servants and his captains and his officials. So the king of Babylon took him captive in the eighth year of his reign.
v.NIV: Jehoiachin king of Judah, his mother, his attendants, his nobles and his officials all surrendered to him. In the eighth year of the reign of the king of Babylon, he took Jehoiachin prisoner.
v.NRSV: King Jehoiachin of Judah gave himself up to the king of Babylon, himself, his mother, his servants, his officers, and his palace officials. The king of Babylon took him prisoner in the eighth year of his reign.
v.SAENEW: 그리하여 유다의 여호야긴 왕은 그의 어머니와 신하들과 지휘관들과 내시들과 함께 바빌로니아 왕을 맞으러 나갔다. 그러나 바빌로니아 왕은 오히려 여호야긴을 사로잡아 갔다. 때는 바빌로니아 왕 제 팔년이었다.
v.WLB: 그러자 유다 왕 여호야긴과 그 어머니와 그 신하들과 귀족들과 지휘관들이 느부갓네살에게 나왔습니다. 느부갓네살은 여호야긴을 포로로 사로잡았습니다. 느부갓네살 왕이 통치한 지 8년째의 일이었습니다.

v.CNV: 他又从耶路撒冷把耶和华殿一切宝物和王宫的宝物取去，并且把以色列王所罗门在耶和华殿所做的一切金器都捣毁，就像耶和华所说的。
v.ESV: and carried off all the treasures of the house of the Lord and the treasures of the king's house, and cut in pieces all the vessels of gold in the temple of the Lord , which Solomon king of Israel had made, as the Lord had foretold.
v.GAE: 그가 여호와의 성전의 모든 보물과 왕궁 보물을 집어내고 또 이스라엘의 왕 솔로몬이 만든 것 곧 여호와의 성전의 금 그릇을 다 파괴하였으니 여호와의 말씀과 같이 되었더라
v.KJV: And he carried out thence all the treasures of the house of the LORD, and the treasures of the king’s house, and cut in pieces all the vessels of gold which Solomon king of Israel had made in the temple of the LORD, as the LORD had said.
v.NASB: He carried out from there all the treasures of the house of the LORD, and the treasures of the king's house, and cut in pieces all the vessels of gold which Solomon king of Israel had made in the temple of the LORD, just as the LORD had said.
v.NIV: As the Lord had declared, Nebuchadnezzar removed the treasures from the temple of the Lord and from the royal palace, and cut up the gold articles that Solomon king of Israel had made for the temple of the Lord .
v.NRSV: He carried off all the treasures of the house of the LORD, and the treasures of the king’s house; he cut in pieces all the vessels of gold in the temple of the LORD, which King Solomon of Israel had made, all this as the LORD had foretold.
v.SAENEW: 그리고 느부갓네살은 주님의 성전 안에 있는 보물과 왕궁 안에 있는 보물들을 모두 탈취하여 갔고, 이스라엘의 솔로몬 왕이 만든 주님의 성전의 금그릇들을 모두 산산조각 내어서 깨뜨려 버렸다. 이것은 주님께서 미리 말씀하신 대로 된 일이다.
v.WLB: 여호와께서 선포하신 대로 느부갓네살은 여호와의 성전과 왕궁에서 모든 보물들을 꺼내가고 이스라엘 왕 솔로몬이 여호와의 성전에 만들어 놓은 금 기구들을 모두 산산조각 냈습니다.

v.CNV: 他又掳去耶路撒冷的众民、众领袖，以及英勇的战士共一万人，还有工匠、铁匠；除了国民中最贫穷的以外，没有剩下的。
v.ESV: He carried away all Jerusalem and all the officials and all the mighty men of valor, 10,000 captives, and all the craftsmen and the smiths. None remained, except the poorest people of the land.
v.GAE: 그가 또 예루살렘의 모든 백성과 모든 지도자와 모든 용사 만 명과 모든 장인과 대장장이를 사로잡아 가매 비천한 자 외에는 그 땅에 남은 자가 없었더라
v.KJV: And he carried away all Jerusalem, and all the princes, and all the mighty men of valour, even ten thousand captives, and all the craftsmen and smiths: none remained, save the poorest sort of the people of the land.
v.NASB: Then he led away into exile all Jerusalem and all the captains and all the mighty men of valor, ten thousand captives, and all the craftsmen and the smiths. None remained except the poorest people of the land.
v.NIV: He carried all Jerusalem into exile: all the officers and fighting men, and all the skilled workers and artisans—a total of ten thousand. Only the poorest people of the land were left.
v.NRSV: He carried away all Jerusalem, all the officials, all the warriors, ten thousand captives, all the artisans and the smiths; no one remained, except the poorest people of the land.
v.SAENEW: 더욱이 그는 예루살렘의 모든 주민과, 관리와 용사 만 명 뿐만 아니라, 모든 기술자와 대장장이를 사로잡아 갔다. 그래서 그 땅에는 아주 가난한 사람들 말고는 하나도 남지 않았다.
v.WLB: 느부갓네살은 또 예루살렘의 모든 백성들을 포로로 잡아갔습니다. 모든 관료들과 모든 용사들을 합쳐 모두 1만 명과 모든 직공들과 대장장이들까지 그 땅에서 가장 가난한 사람들만 빼고는 남은 사람이 없었습니다.

v.CNV: 他把约雅斤掳到巴比伦去，又把太后、后妃、太监和国中的要员都从耶路撒冷掳到巴比伦；
v.ESV: And he carried away Jehoiachin to Babylon. The king's mother, the king's wives, his officials, and the chief men of the land he took into captivity from Jerusalem to Babylon.
v.GAE: 그가 여호야긴을 바벨론으로 사로잡아 가고 왕의 어머니와 왕의 아내들과 내시들과 나라에 권세 있는 자도 예루살렘에서 바벨론으로 사로잡아 가고
v.KJV: And he carried away Jehoiachin to Babylon, and the king’s mother, and the king’s wives, and his officers, and the mighty of the land, those carried he into captivity from Jerusalem to Babylon.
v.NASB: So he led Jehoiachin away into exile to Babylon; also the king's mother and the king's wives and his officials and the leading men of the land, he led away into exile from Jerusalem to Babylon.
v.NIV: Nebuchadnezzar took Jehoiachin captive to Babylon. He also took from Jerusalem to Babylon the king’s mother, his wives, his officials and the prominent people of the land.
v.NRSV: He carried away Jehoiachin to Babylon; the king’s mother, the king’s wives, his officials, and the elite of the land, he took into captivity from Jerusalem to Babylon.
v.SAENEW: 느부갓네살은 여호야긴 왕을 바빌론으로 사로잡아 갔다. 그의 어머니와 왕비들과 내시들과 그 땅의 고관들을 모두 예루살렘에서 바빌론으로 사로잡아 갔다.
v.WLB: 느부갓네살은 여호야긴을 포로로 잡아 바벨론으로 데려갔습니다. 그리고 왕의 어머니와 왕비들과 그의 관료들과 그 땅의 지도자들도 예루살렘에서 바벨론으로 잡아갔습니다.

v.CNV: 还有七千位战士，一千位工匠和铁匠，全都是能作战的勇士，巴比伦王把他们都掳到巴比伦去。
v.ESV: And the king of Babylon brought captive to Babylon all the men of valor, 7,000, and the craftsmen and the metal workers, 1,000, all of them strong and fit for war.
v.GAE: 또 용사 칠천 명과 장인과 대장장이 천 명 곧 용감하여 싸움을 할 만한 모든 자들을 바벨론 왕이 바벨론으로 사로잡아 가고
v.KJV: And all the men of might, even seven thousand, and craftsmen and smiths a thousand, all that were strong and apt for war, even them the king of Babylon brought captive to Babylon.
v.NASB: All the men of valor, seven thousand, and the craftsmen and the smiths, one thousand, all strong and fit for war, and these the king of Babylon brought into exile to Babylon.
v.NIV: The king of Babylon also deported to Babylon the entire force of seven thousand fighting men, strong and fit for war, and a thousand skilled workers and artisans.
v.NRSV: The king of Babylon brought captive to Babylon all the men of valor, seven thousand, the artisans and the smiths, one thousand, all of them strong and fit for war.
v.SAENEW: 또 칠천 명의 용사와 천 명의 기술자와 대장장이를 바빌론으로 사로잡아 갔는데, 이들은 모두 뛰어난 용사요, 훈련된 전사들이었다.
v.WLB: 바벨론 왕은 또한 전쟁에 준비된 강한 용사 7,000명과 직공과 대장장이 1,000명을 바벨론으로 잡아갔습니다.

v.CNV: 巴比伦王立约雅斤的叔叔玛探雅接续他作王，并且把玛探雅的名字改为西底家。
v.ESV: And the king of Babylon made Mattaniah, Jehoiachin's uncle, king in his place, and changed his name to Zedekiah.
v.GAE: 바벨론 왕이 또 여호야긴의 숙부 맛다니야를 대신하여 왕으로 삼고 그의 이름을 고쳐 시드기야라 하였더라
v.KJV: And the king of Babylon made Mattaniah his father’s brother king in his stead, and changed his name to Zedekiah.
v.NASB: Then the king of Babylon made his uncle Mattaniah king in his place, and changed his name to Zedekiah.
v.NIV: He made Mattaniah, Jehoiachin’s uncle, king in his place and changed his name to Zedekiah.
v.NRSV: The king of Babylon made Mattaniah, Jehoiachin’s uncle, king in his place, and changed his name to Zedekiah.
v.SAENEW: 바빌로니아 왕이 여호야긴의 삼촌 맛다니야를 여호야긴 대신에 왕으로 세우고, 그의 이름을 시드기야로 고치게 하였다.
v.WLB: 느부갓네살은 여호야긴의 삼촌인 맛다니야를 여호야긴 대신에 왕으로 세우고 이름을 시드기야로 바꾸었습니다.

v.CNV: 西底家登基的时候是二十一岁，他在耶路撒冷作王十一年；他母亲名叫哈慕他，是立拿人耶利米的女儿。
v.ESV: Zedekiah was twenty-one years old when he became king, and he reigned eleven years in Jerusalem. His mother's name was Hamutal the daughter of Jeremiah of Libnah.
v.GAE: 시드기야가 왕이 될 때에 나이가 이십일 세라 예루살렘에서 십일 년간 다스리니라 그의 어머니의 이름은 하무달이요 립나인 예레미야의 딸이더라
v.KJV: Zedekiah was twenty and one years old when he began to reign, and he reigned eleven years in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Hamutal, the daughter of Jeremiah of Libnah.
v.NASB: Zedekiah was twenty-one years old when he became king, and he reigned eleven years in Jerusalem; and his mother's name was Hamutal the daughter of Jeremiah of Libnah.
v.NIV: Zedekiah was twenty-one years old when he became king, and he reigned in Jerusalem eleven years. His mother’s name was Hamutal daughter of Jeremiah; she was from Libnah.
v.NRSV: Zedekiah was twenty-one years old when he began to reign; he reigned eleven years in Jerusalem. His mother’s name was Hamutal daughter of Jeremiah of Libnah.
v.SAENEW: 시드기야가 왕이 되었을 때에, 그는 스물한 살이었다. 그는 예루살렘에서 열한 해 동안 다스렸다. 그의 어머니 하무달은 립나 출신으로 예레미야의 딸이다.
v.WLB: 시드기야는 21세에 왕이 돼 예루살렘에서 11년 동안 다스렸습니다. 그의 어머니의 이름은 하무달로서 립나 예레미야의 딸입니다.

v.CNV: 他行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，像约雅敬一切所行的。
v.ESV: And he did what was evil in the sight of the Lord , according to all that Jehoiakim had done.
v.GAE: 그가 여호야김의 모든 행위를 따라 여호와 보시기에 악을 행한지라
v.KJV: And he did that which was evil in the sight of the LORD, according to all that Jehoiakim had done.
v.NASB: He did evil in the sight of the LORD, according to all that Jehoiakim had done.
v.NIV: He did evil in the eyes of the Lord , just as Jehoiakim had done.
v.NRSV: He did what was evil in the sight of the LORD, just as Jehoiakim had done.
v.SAENEW: 그는 여호야김이 하였던 것과 똑같이, 주님께서 보시기에 악한 일을 하였다.
v.WLB: 시드기야는 여호야김이 그랬던 것처럼 여호와 보시기에 악을 저질렀습니다.

v.CNV: 因为耶和华的怒气向耶路撒冷和犹大发作，直到他把他们从自己的面前赶走。后来，西底家背叛了巴比伦王。
v.ESV: For because of the anger of the Lord it came to the point in Jerusalem and Judah that he cast them out from his presence. And Zedekiah rebelled against the king of Babylon.
v.GAE: 여호와께서 예루살렘과 유다를 진노하심이 그들을 그 앞에서 쫓아내실 때까지 이르렀더라 시드기야가 바벨론 왕을 배반하니라
v.KJV: For through the anger of the LORD it came to pass in Jerusalem and Judah, until he had cast them out from his presence, that Zedekiah rebelled against the king of Babylon.
v.NASB: For through the anger of the LORD this came about in Jerusalem and Judah until He cast them out from His presence. And Zedekiah rebelled against the king of Babylon.
v.NIV: It was because of the Lord ’s anger that all this happened to Jerusalem and Judah, and in the end he thrust them from his presence. Now Zedekiah rebelled against the king of Babylon.
v.NRSV: Indeed, Jerusalem and Judah so angered the LORD that he expelled them from his presence. Zedekiah rebelled against the king of Babylon.
v.SAENEW: 예루살렘과 유다가 주님을 그토록 진노하시게 하였기 때문에, 주님께서는 마침내 그들을 주님 앞에서 쫓아내셨다. 시드기야가 바빌로니아 왕에게 반기를 들었으므로,
v.WLB: 예루살렘과 유다에 이런 일이 일어난 것은 여호와의 진노 때문으로 여호와께서는 결국 그들을 여호와 앞에서 쫓아내신 것입니다. 그때 시드기야가 바벨론 왕에게 대항해 반역을 일으켰습니다.
